---
title: "supplementary_docs"
---

This site is partly a playground for maintainers of the [Exercism][web-exercism] scientific tracks, and partly a supplemntal source for interested students.

Early content is [in R][statdist-r.qmd].
Python and Julia will be added as time allows.

____

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
